turns.user_message: I get this tightness in my chest whenever I think about it. It's just this constant, low hum of regret.
That feeling sits there all day, like a weight I can't put down. I'm starting to think I deserve to carry it.
The heaviness is so constant I'm wondering if I should talk to someone about it. I don't know how to make it stop on my own.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
